content: No abnormal findings on physical examination during second admission
Treatment during second admission was monitored by time-kill curve and vancomycin dosage
span: The treatment was monitored by a time-kill curve and by vancomycin dosage

content: Vancomycin-rifampin antagonistic effects were considered but not observed in this patient
span: some studies suggest that its combination with vancomycin may have antagonistic effects, although this was not the case with our patient
